objective: Improve conversion quality for founder-led service sales

milestones.name: Launch the first Mexico-first acquisition experiment on the best-fit channel.
milestones.success_metric: Primera ejecucion lanzada con mensaje claro y seguimiento activo.
milestones.learning_goal: Aprender si el movimiento de entrada recomendado produce senal creible del comprador con rapidez.
risk_watchouts: Execution may still fail if the offer is not explained with enough specificity.

milestones.name: Test the target pricing tier with explicit scope and proof.
milestones.success_metric: Oferta, precio y objeciones actualizados con retroalimentacion real.
milestones.learning_goal: Usar objeciones y primeras victorias para afinar alcance, prueba y logica de precio.
risk_watchouts: Channel assumptions should be validated with early conversion data.

milestones.name: Measure conversion quality, not just lead volume, for 30 days.
milestones.success_metric: Calidad de conversion medida y siguiente decision de canal documentada.
milestones.learning_goal: Decidir si conviene escalar, refinar o descartar la jugada actual.
risk_watchouts: Execution may still fail if the offer is not explained with enough specificity.

workstreams.name: Validacion de demanda
workstreams.focus: Launch the first Mexico-first acquisition experiment on the best-fit channel.

workstreams.name: Refinamiento de oferta y precio
workstreams.focus: Test the target pricing tier with explicit scope and proof.

workstreams.name: Revision de decision
workstreams.focus: Measure conversion quality, not just lead volume, for 30 days.

validation_agenda: Execution may still fail if the offer is not explained with enough specificity.
Channel assumptions should be validated with early conversion data.
sequence_rationale: Empieza por la accion de mayor confianza antes de ampliar alcance.
Usa retroalimentacion real del mercado para afinar precio y promesa de entrega.
Escala solo cuando entiendas la calidad de conversion y la friccion de implementacion.
